headline: ADP Employment, Retail Reports Knock Down Treasuries
summary: A stronger-than-expected reading on the labor market coupled with a solid reading on American spending turned the direction of the U.S. debt market.  Private employers added 62,000 jobs in March, according to the ADP report, above FactSet expectations for 38,500.  In February, private employers added 66,000 jobs.

raw.headline: ADP Employment, Retail Reports Knock Down Treasuries

headline: ADP National Employment Report: Private Sector Employment Increased by 62,000 Jobs in March; Annual Pay was Up 4.5%
summary: Private sector employment increased by 62,000 jobs in March and pay was up 4.5 percent year-over-year according to the March ADP National Employment Report® produced by ADP Research in collaboration with the Stanford Digital Economy Lab ("Stanford Lab").
